headline: Emerson Introduces Next-Generation Industrial Data Fabric, Providing Foundation for Integrated Data Platform
summary: Advancements to the AspenTech Inmation OT Data Fabric unify OT data into a contextualized, AI-ready foundation that enables the development of an enterprise operations platform.High resolution...
